message:
Add Prow auto-bump periodic job (#45)

This adds a weekly periodic job that checks for new Prow releases
and creates PRs to update the image versions in the manifests.

- Runs every Monday at 3:30 AM UTC
- Uses generic-autobumper from Prow
- Updates images in clusters/prow/manifests/prow/*.yaml

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+# Prow auto-bump configuration for kubestellar/infra
+# This config is used by the generic-autobumper to update Prow images
+
+gitHubOrg: kubestellar
+gitHubRepo: infra
+gitHubLogin: kubestellar-bot
+gitHubToken: /etc/github-token/token
+gitName: KubeStellar Bot
+gitEmail: bot@kubestellar.io
+
+# Target branch for the PR
+targetBranch: main
+
+# PR title prefix
+onCallAddress: ""
+skipPullRequest: false
+
+# Prefixes for images to bump
+prefixes:
+  # Main Prow images from k8s-infra-prow
+  - name: prow
+    prefix: us-docker.pkg.dev/k8s-infra-prow/images/
+    refConfigFile: ""
+    stagingRefConfigFile: ""
+    repo: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/prow
+    summarise: true
+    consistentImages: true
+  # GCS web uses gcr.io/k8s-prow
+  - name: prow-gcr
+    prefix: gcr.io/k8s-prow/
+    refConfigFile: ""
+    stagingRefConfigFile: ""
+    repo: https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra
+    summarise: true
+    consistentImages: true
+
+# Files to update
+includedConfigPaths:
+  - clusters/prow/manifests/prow/*.yaml
+  - prow/jobs/**/*.yaml
+
+# Exclude test files
+excludedConfigPaths: []
+
+# Extra files to include in the PR
+extraFiles: []
+
+# PR body template
+prBodyTemplate: |
+  This PR updates Prow component images to the latest version.
+
+  ## Changes
+  {{range .Updates}}
+  - {{.Name}}: {{.OldVersion}} → {{.NewVersion}}
+  {{end}}
+
+  /cc @kubestellar/prow-admins
+
+  ---
+  Generated by [Prow auto-bumper](https://docs.prow.k8s.io)

@@ -58,3 +58,30 @@ periodics:
       - name: oauth-token
         secret:
           secretName: github-oauth-token
+
+  - name: ci-infra-prow-autobump
+    cron: "30 3 * * 1"  # Weekly on Monday at 3:30 AM UTC
+    cluster: default
+    decorate: true
+    labels:
+      app: autobumper
+    extra_refs:
+    - org: kubestellar
+      repo: infra
+      base_ref: main
+      clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/infra.git"
+    spec:
+      containers:
+      - image: us-docker.pkg.dev/k8s-infra-prow/images/generic-autobumper:v20260109-e821f0db6
+        command:
+        - generic-autobumper
+        args:
+        - --config=/home/prow/go/src/github.com/kubestellar/infra/prow/autobump-config.yaml
+        volumeMounts:
+        - name: github-token
+          mountPath: /etc/github-token
+          readOnly: true
+      volumes:
+      - name: github-token
+        secret:
+          secretName: github-token
